when_to_use: PayPay and carrier billing for Japanese digital goods merchants

review.verdict: Comprehensive Japanese PSP covering every method that matters, but integration is dated and slow.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises needing one PSP for cards, PayPay, carrier billing, and more
review.not_for: Small teams or English-first devs wanting fast modern API onboarding
